title: cerastium riaei subsp. lamottei
intro: Cerastium riaei subsp. lamottei is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family, known for its daisy-like appearance and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cerastium riaei subsp. lamottei include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the dried leaves and flowers being used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
